untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order book microstructure logic (time precedence, bid/offer queue position, price improvement mechanics) which cannot be expressed using only OHLCV-derived indicators. Concepts like 'competing traders at same price level', 'time precedence holder', 'minimum tick increments', and 'order queue position' require real-time order book data and are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This signal describes an order book trading tactic rather than a price-action pattern. The entry conditions (identify time-precedence holder, improve price by 4+ ticks) and exit conditions (order filled at improved price) are execution-level decisions that depend on live order book state and latency optimization, not historical OHLCV data. A proper backtest would require tick-level order book snapshots and order execution simulation.
